## Validation

- [ ] `dart tool/inkroot.dart verify`
- [ ] Platform build checked when relevant: Android / iOS / macOS / Windows / Linux / Web
- [ ] UI changes include screenshots or screen recording
- [ ] Data migration, sync, import, or backup changes include rollback/edge-case notes

## Risk

- [ ] No user data migration
- [ ] No signing, token, or credential changes
- [ ] No platform permission changes
